reference: OF THE MANY TIMES HE HAD EXAMINED MISTER WICKER'S WINDOW AND PORED OVER THE ROPE THE SHIP AND THE NUBIAN BOY HE HAD NEVER GONE INTO MISTER WICKER'S SHOP
text: of the many times he had examined mr wicker's window and pored over the rope the ship and the nubian boy he had never gone into mr wicker's shop
